crises.title: Crises in Autism
crises.description: Learn practical strategies to calm sensory overload and deal with moments of crisis.

direitos.title: TEA Rights in Brazil
direitos.description: A complete guide on laws, benefits, and guarantees for people with autism in Brazil.

seletividade.title: Food Selectivity
seletividade.description: Tips and techniques to deal with common eating difficulties in the autism spectrum.

higiene.title: Hygiene without Crisis
higiene.description: How to make personal hygiene moments calmer and more predictable for the child.

diagnostico.title: The Diagnosis Arrived, Now What?
diagnostico.description: The first steps and fundamental guidelines for families who have just received the diagnosis.

sinais.title: Signs of Autism
sinais.description: Understand the main signs and behaviors that may indicate autism spectrum disorder.

guia.title: Initial Guide
guia.description: An essential introductory material to understand the basics of TEA and how to start support.

v1.title: Advanced Sensory Regulation Strategies
v1.description: Learn practical techniques to help with sensory regulation in daily life.

v2.title: Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC)
v2.description: How to introduce and use alternative communication systems.

v3.title: Managing Challenging Behaviors
v3.description: Understanding the function of behavior and intervention strategies.

sos.title: Sensory SOS
sos.description: Immediate tools for sensory regulation, alternative communication, and crisis support.

sos.title: Digital ID
sos.subtitle: Conecta TEA Identification and Support
sos.loginRequired: You need to login to access the Digital ID.
sos.scanInstructions: Scan to see crisis approach instructions
sos.crisisNotice: In case of crisis: Stay calm, avoid sudden touches and excessive noise.
sos.presentationNotice: This ID can be presented in schools, hospitals, and public agencies.

placeholders.observations: Ex: Auditory sensitivity, prefers visual communication
placeholders.emergencyNote: Ex: In case of crisis, please speak calmly and do not touch without permission.

emergency.teaStatement: This person has Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD).
emergency.crisisAdvice: In case of crisis or disorientation, please stay calm, avoid sudden touches and excessive noise.

donation.description: Help us expand autism support communities and social impact technology.

videos.gallerySubtitle: Educational and informative content about autism.

supportModal.title: Support the Project
supportModal.pixDesc: Your donation helps keep the app free for thousands of families.
supportModal.footer: All proceeds are reinvested in app improvements and servers.

hero.title: Do you notice that something might be different about your child... but you don't know what to do?
hero.badge: You are not alone. This happens to many families.
hero.subtitle: You just need to take the first step. We'll help you with the rest.
hero.feature1: No complicated registration. Start in seconds.
hero.feature2: If it's not useful, you can leave at any time.
hero.socialProof: Real families are already using it and finding support.
hero.warning: Ignoring this can delay the child's development.

step1.title: Understand the signs
step1.desc: Identify important behaviors in a simple way.

step2.title: Connect
step2.desc: Find families and support in your city.

step3.title: Act safely
step3.desc: Receive practical guidance for the next steps.

whyUs.badge: If you've made it this far, you're probably looking for answers.
whyUs.title: This app is for you if:
whyUs.item1: You have doubts about your child's development
whyUs.item2: You want to better understand signs of autism
whyUs.item3: You are looking for reliable support and guidance
whyUs.item4: You feel lost and need direction
whyUs.highlight: If you have doubts... it's already a sign that it's worth investigating.

item4.title: Initial Support
item4.desc: Technology to help understand early signs

impact.title: The sooner signs of autism are identified, the greater the chances of the child's development.
impact.highlight: Every month makes a difference in development.
impact.subtitle: Our technology helps you act at the right time.

trust.title: Created for real families, by those who understand this journey.
trust.subtitle: Building a support network for TEA families in Brazil 🇧🇷
trust.badge: Based on best practices used by professionals.

finalCta.title: You've made it this far for a reason.
finalCta.subtitle: Now you can take the first step.
finalCta.warning: Ignoring this today can become regret tomorrow.

donation.developer: Developer of Conecta TEA and TEA IA Triage:

triagem.title: TEA IA Triage
triagem.subtitle: Our artificial intelligence tool was developed to assist in the early identification of signs of autism. A fast, secure, and evidence-based analysis to guide the next steps.
triagem.feature1Desc: Algorithms trained to identify behavioral patterns sensitively.
triagem.feature2Desc: Your data is protected and the analysis is totally confidential and private.
triagem.feature3Desc: Receive clear guidance on how to seek appropriate professional help.
triagem.disclaimer: * This tool does not replace professional medical diagnosis.
